values.content:
=You are a senior portfolio risk analyst with CFA designation. Analyze the provided portfolio data and generate a professional, actionable risk report. Be specific, data-driven, and concise. Use bullet points where helpful. Never make specific buy/sell recommendations — provide analysis only. Format output as clean HTML suitable for an email body (use

,

,

    ,
  • , , for warnings, for positives). Do NOT include , , tags.

=You are a senior portfolio risk analyst with CFA-level expertise. Analyze the provided portfolio data and generate a professional, concise, and data-driven portfolio risk report. Your output must be written as CLEAN, VALID HTML suitable for inserting directly into an email body. STRICT OUTPUT RULES: - Output ONLY the final HTML report - Do NOT include markdown - Do NOT use triple backticks - Do NOT include JSON - Do NOT include explanations before or after the HTML - Do NOT include , , or tags - Use only these HTML tags:

,

,

    ,
  • , , - Ensure ALL HTML tags are properly opened and closed - Keep formatting clean and professional - Use: - for warnings / elevated risk - for positive observations ANALYSIS RULES: - Be specific and reference exact values, percentages, counts, and concentrations from the data - Be concise but insightful - Avoid generic filler language - Never make direct buy/sell recommendations - Do not mention that you are an AI - If data is missing for any section, state that clearly and continue TONE: - Professional - Analytical - Client-facing - Actionable but not advisory Analyze this portfolio and generate a comprehensive risk report. PORTFOLIO SUMMARY: {{ JSON.stringify($json.portfolio_summary, null, 2) }} SECTOR BREAKDOWN: {{ JSON.stringify($json.sector_breakdown, null, 2) }} ASSET CLASS BREAKDOWN: {{ JSON.stringify($json.asset_class_breakdown, null, 2) }} RISK FLAGS: {{ JSON.stringify($json.risk_flags, null, 2) }} TOP GAINERS: {{ JSON.stringify($json.top_gainers, null, 2) }} TOP LOSERS: {{ JSON.stringify($json.top_losers, null, 2) }} HOLDINGS DETAIL (all positions): {{ JSON.stringify($json.holdings, null, 2) }} Structure the report exactly in this order:

    Executive Summary

    - 2 to 3 concise sentences summarizing overall risk, diversification, and performance

    Sector Concentration Analysis

    - Identify overexposed sectors with exact percentages - Highlight any sector exceeding prudent diversification thresholds

    Risk Concentration Issues

    - Evaluate: - single-stock concentration - top-3 holdings concentration - underdiversification - any notable concentration or correlation risks

    Performance Highlights

    - Summarize strongest and weakest contributors - Include exact returns / PnL where relevant - Add brief context only if clearly supported by portfolio composition

    Asset Class Diversification Assessment

    - Evaluate diversification across equity, fixed income, commodities, cash, or other asset classes - Highlight imbalances clearly

    Key Risk Mitigation Suggestions

    - Provide 3 to 5 portfolio-structure suggestions focused on diversification, concentration reduction, or risk balancing - Do NOT tell the client to buy or sell specific securities

    Overall Risk Rating Explanation

    - Explain why this portfolio deserves a risk score of {{ $json.portfolio_summary.risk_score }}/100 and risk label {{ $json.portfolio_summary.risk_label }} - Tie the explanation directly to the data above

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Analyze Portfolio Risk').first().json; const webhook = $('Receive Portfolio Request').first().json; const aiRaw = $input.first().json; const aiText = aiRaw?.message?.content || aiRaw?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || aiRaw?.output?.[0]?.content?.[0]?.text || aiRaw?.text || 'AI insights unavailable.'; const body = webhook.body || {}; const query = webhook.query || {}; const headers = webhook.headers || {}; const userName = body.userName || query.userName || 'Investor'; const userEmail = body.userEmail || query.userEmail || headers['x-user-email'] || headers['X-User-Email'] || 'fallback@example.com'; const summary = data.portfolio_summary; const riskColor = summary.risk_label === 'HIGH' ? '#e74c3c' : summary.risk_label === 'MEDIUM' ? '#f39c12' : '#27ae60'; const fmtCurrency = (n) => new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD' }).format(Number(n || 0)); const fmtPct = (n) => `${Number(n || 0) > 0 ? '+' : ''}${Number(n || 0)}%`; const pnlColor = (n) => Number(n || 0) >= 0 ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'; const sectorRows = data.sector_breakdown.map(s => ` ${s.sector} ${fmtCurrency(s.market_value)} ${s.allocation_pct}%${s.allocation_pct > 35 ? ' ' : ''} ${(s.tickers || []).join(', ')} `).join(''); const holdingRows = [...data.holdings] .sort((a, b) => b.market_value - a.market_value) .slice(0, 10) .map(h => ` ${h.ticker} ${h.sector} ${fmtCurrency(h.market_value)} ${h.allocation_pct}% ${fmtCurrency(h.pnl)} (${fmtPct(h.pnl_pct)}) `).join(''); const riskAlertBanner = (data.risk_flags.overweight_stocks.length > 0 || data.risk_flags.overweight_sectors.length > 0 || data.risk_flags.top3_concentration_risk) ? `
${data.risk_flags.overweight_stocks.map(s => `
• ${s.ticker} represents ${s.allocation_pct}% of portfolio (threshold: ${data.risk_flags.single_stock_threshold}%)
`).join('')} ${data.risk_flags.overweight_sectors.map(s => `
• ${s.sector} sector is ${s.allocation_pct}% of portfolio (threshold: ${data.risk_flags.sector_threshold}%)
`).join('')} ${data.risk_flags.top3_concentration_risk ? `
• Top 3 holdings = ${data.risk_flags.top3_concentration_pct}% of portfolio (threshold: 60%)
` : ''}
` : ''; const html = `
Portfolio Risk Report

Portfolio Analysis

Generated ${new Date(summary.analysis_timestamp).toLocaleString('en-US', {dateStyle:'full',timeStyle:'short'})} · For ${userName}

Portfolio Value
${fmtCurrency(summary.total_market_value)}
Total P&L
${fmtCurrency(summary.total_pnl)} (${fmtPct(summary.total_pnl_pct)})
Holdings
${summary.holding_count}
Risk Level
${summary.risk_label} ${summary.risk_score}/100
${riskAlertBanner}

AI Risk Analysis

${aiText}

Sector Breakdown

${sectorRows}
Sector Market Value Allocation Tickers

Top 10 Holdings

${holdingRows}
Ticker Sector Market Value Weight P&L

Disclaimer: This report is generated by an automated AI system for informational purposes only. It does not constitute financial advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

Generated by Portfolio Risk Analyzer · ${new Date().toISOString()}

`; return [{ json: { html_email: html, user_email: userEmail, user_name: userName, risk_label: summary.risk_label, risk_score: summary.risk_score, total_value: summary.total_market_value, total_pnl: summary.total_pnl, report_id: `RPT-${Date.now()}` } }];

parameters.subject: ={{ ' Portfolio Risk Report — ' + $json.risk_label + ' Risk | $' + Number($json.total_value || 0).toLocaleString() + ' | ' + new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', {month:'short', day:'numeric', year:'numeric'}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, report_id: $('Build Portfolio Email Report').first().json.report_id, message: 'Portfolio analysis complete. Report processed successfully.', sent_to: $('Build Portfolio Email Report').first().json.user_email, risk_label: $('Build Portfolio Email Report').first().json.risk_label, risk_score: $('Build Portfolio Email Report').first().json.risk_score, total_value: $('Build Portfolio Email Report').first().json.total_value }) }}

nodes.name: Check User Email for Error Alert

parameters.message:
Hi,

We were unable to process your portfolio file. The uploaded CSV or Google Sheet appears to be empty or incorrectly formatted.

Required columns: ticker, company, sector, quantity, avg_buy_price, current_price, asset_class

Please check your file and try again.

— Portfolio Risk Analyzer
parameters.subject: Portfolio Analysis Failed — Empty or Invalid File

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": false, "error": "Portfolio data is empty or invalid. Please check your CSV columns: ticker, company, sector, quantity, avg_buy_price, current_price, asset_class" }

parameters.content:
## AI Portfolio Analysis Workflow

Automates portfolio ingestion, validation, risk analysis, AI insights generation, and reporting using Webhook, CSV/Google Sheets, AI, and Email

## Flow:

Webhook → Select Data Source → Parse Data → Merge Holdings → Set Metadata → Analyze Risk → Validate Portfolio

→ Valid → Generate AI Insights → Build Report → Send Email → API Response
→ Invalid → Check Email → Send Alert → Error Response

## Setup Steps

Configure the Webhook to receive portfolio input (CSV upload or request body).
Ensure CSV structure and Google Sheet contain required fields (stock, quantity, sector, etc.).

Set up credentials for:

Google Sheets
Email service (Gmail)
AI node (for insights generation)

Add a Set node to standardize:

User details (email, name)
Data source (CSV / Sheets)
Portfolio metadata

Verify:

Field mappings across CSV/Sheets
Validation logic before analysis
Email formatting and delivery steps

## How It Works

Portfolio data is submitted via Webhook and routed based on source (CSV or Google Sheets).
The system parses and combines holdings into a unified structure, then enriches it with user metadata.

Risk analysis calculates allocation, sector exposure, and concentration.
A validation step ensures the portfolio is usable.

For valid portfolios: AI generates insights (risk, diversification, exposure), builds a report, and sends it via email.
For invalid portfolios: the system sends an alert email and returns an error response.

## Portfolio Request Intake

Triggers the workflow via a Webhook and captures incoming portfolio requests, allowing users to submit data (CSV or API payload) that initiates the end-to-end portfolio analysis process without manual intervention.

## Portfolio Data Preparation & Loading

Processes the selected data source by preparing uploaded CSV files or fetching records from Google Sheets, then converts the data into a structured format for downstream portfolio analysis and processing.

## Portfolio Processing & Risk Validation

Combines portfolio holdings into a unified structure, enriches the data with user and source details, performs risk and allocation analysis, and validates the portfolio to ensure it meets the required criteria before proceeding to insights or error handling.

## AI Processing & Response Handling

Executes custom logic and AI-driven analysis to generate portfolio insights, sends the final report or alerts via email, and returns the workflow outcome to the user through a webhook response.

## Error Handling & Alerting

Validates user contact details, sends failure notifications via email, and returns an error response when portfolio data does not meet required criteria.

main.node: Check User Email for Error Alert
